text:
Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = U.S. citizen or U.S. national 
1 = Qualified non-citizen 
2 = Lawfully present under Children's Health Insurance Program Reauthorization Act (CHIPRA) 214 
3 = Eligible only for payment for emergency services 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown
